notes: Focused defect: tools/assemble.py overlays the Java 11 provider at its unversioned relative path, replacing the Java 8 root entry and omitting the required versioned entry. The reference changes only that archive-name mapping. The protected test runs build.sh with a deterministic offline JDK test double and checks the required archive entries, manifest semantics, root service descriptor, class-file target versions, byte-for-byte rebuild determinism, and ServiceLoader-style output through Java 8 and Java 11 multi-release views. No host JDK, third-party dependency, or network access is required.
